mapper.select: select li.id, li.name from label_info li where li.is_deleted = 0 and li.type = #{itemType} and li.id in (select label_id from apartment_label where is_deleted = 0 and apartment_id = #{apartmentId})
select id, type, name from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from room_label where is_deleted = 0 and room_id = #{id})
